content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月15日 周三
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [MDX-Tom/gpt-5.6-instruct](https://github.com/MDX-Tom/gpt-5.6-instruct)
   A Codex CLI jailbreak prompt and test pack for gpt-5.6-sol. 针对 gpt-5.6 系列的 Codex | ⭐1090
2. [mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide](https://github.com/mereyabdenbekuly-ctrl/clodex-ide)
   Local-first, zero-trust agentic IDE for verifiable autonomous software developme | ⭐802
3. [QuantumByteOSS/quantumbyte](https://github.com/QuantumByteOSS/quantumbyte)
   Open-source app builder engine — intent to working app | ⭐288
4. [barretlee/agent-pulse](https://github.com/barretlee/agent-pulse)
   Evidence-backed AI industry intelligence — trends, source updates, daily data re | ⭐165
5. [Extraltodeus/J-Wash](https://github.com/Extraltodeus/J-Wash)
   Jacobian-Brainwash : A framework built on Anthropic's Jacobian Lens for analyzin | ⭐143
6. [nihe0909/xiaohongshu-ai-workbench](https://github.com/nihe0909/xiaohongshu-ai-workbench)
   《小红书运营手册 · AI工作台》: free Codex Skills for Xiaohongshu operations | ⭐125
7. [videlalvaro/leet-llm](https://github.com/videlalvaro/leet-llm)
   A hands-on Swift and Metal course for building LLM inference from first principl | ⭐124
8. [LonghornSilicon/awesome-ai-accelerators](https://github.com/LonghornSilicon/awesome-ai-accelerators)
   A curated list of AI accelerator papers, resources, tools, and open-source proje | ⭐116

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
